query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_customer,
  SUM(CASE WHEN customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_customer
FROM services;
